title: AI Threat Detection
description: Our computer vision model detects unauthorized access, unusual behavior, and perimeter breaches in real time — before your guard looks up.

title: Unlimited Cameras
description: Connect any IP camera brand. RTSP, ONVIF, HTTP streams. Sentinel unifies everything in one dashboard regardless of manufacturer.

title: Instant Alerts
description: Push notifications, SMS and email the moment an event is detected. Custom escalation rules per location, per shift, per risk level.

title: Compliance Reports
description: Auto-generated reports for audits, insurance and regulatory requirements. Exportable in PDF. Tamper-proof event log.

title: Forensic Search
description: Search 90 days of footage by event type, time, or location in seconds. Find the clip you need in seconds, not hours.

title: Mobile Command Center
description: Full control from your phone. Watch live feeds, review alerts, and dispatch guards from anywhere with the Sentinel app.
